strengths.item: Dominant market share in online search
strengths.evidence: Google holds ~92% of global search engine market share as of Q4 2021 due to its advanced algorithm and vast data
In 2021, Google invested over $22B globally in R&D, launching products like Google Assistant and Pixel series

strengths.item: Strong brand recognition and customer loyalty
strengths.evidence: Google is consistently ranked in top 5 global brand portfolios by Brand Finance, showing strong brand equity and customer loyalty

weaknesses.item: Increasing competition from social media in advertising
weaknesses.evidence: Facebook/Instagram and other social platforms now garner 22% of digital ad market, reducing Google's share
Search ads and YouTube ads alone made up 82% of Google's total revenue in 2021, risking market volatility

weaknesses.item: Negative public perception due to data privacy concerns
weaknesses.evidence: Multiple lawsuits and public controversies in the last 5 years over user data privacy

opportunities.evidence: Asia-Pacific region is expected to double its internet users by 2025, offering significant growth opportunities
Google Cloud saw 48% annual revenue growth in 2020, positioning for future growth
Google is investing in AI, hardware, and other technologies to generate non-ad revenue

threats.evidence: New CCPA and GDPR regulations impose strict data handling requirements on tech giants
Ongoing investigations by US DOJ, EU, and other countries for monopolistic practices
Rise in targeted attacks against tech companies as seen in recent breaches
